LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRONWORKERS' UNOPPOSED MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED, AS IS A $2,600 AWARD OF ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS. PETITIONER IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND A SEPARATE PROPOSED JUDGMENT. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA A. TORREANO, CSR#8600, E-MAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-13-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The District Council of Ironworkers' unopposed motion to confirm arbitration award is granted, as is a $2,600 award of attorney fees and costs.

Petitioner is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling and a separate proposed judgment.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano, CSR#8600, e-mail: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-12-2019 Continued To Sep-13-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS OF THE STATE's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Continued to 9/13/19 per request of the Moving party and approval of Judge Ulmer to allow Petitioner time to serve Respondent. Email dated 7/10/19.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
